prompt:
Analyze the following text and extract ALL temporal information.

For each date or time reference found, provide:
- The date string (in YYYY-MM-DD format when possible)
- A Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) if the date is specific enough
- A brief context describing what the date refers to

For intervals (e.g. "from 2016 to 2019", "between March and June"), provide:
- start and end timestamps
- context

Also determine the overall time span of the text:
- start_ts: earliest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)
- end_ts: latest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)

Text:
"""[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] Maria said: "Hey John, been a few days since we chatted. In the meantime, I donated my old car to a homeless shelter I volunteer at yesterday. How's the campaign going? I'm keen to hearabout it."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] John said: "Hi Maria! It's been an interesting ride so far. I've been networking with some people to get their input."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] Maria said: "That's awesome, John! Networking is great for gaining new perspectives and insights. Have you had any interesting conversations or revelations so far?"
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] John said: "I just talked to someone who shared some amazing stories. It really fired up my passion to make education better in our area."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] Maria said: "Wow, John! Hearing that can really make an impact and get us fired up to make a difference. It's great to hear that you're feeling motivated to make improvements to our community's education!"
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] John said: "Definitely, Maria. Investing in our future generations is key, giving them the right tools for success. It's the foundation of progress and opportunity."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] Maria said: "Yeah, John. It's amazing how even minor tweaks to the system can make a big difference for lots of people. I'm really impressed with your enthusiasm and commitment to it!"
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] John said: "Thanks, Maria. Your encouragement means a lot to me. It's true that with effort and support, we can make a real difference in our community."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] Maria said: "You got this, John! I believe in your power to make a positive difference. Your passion inspires me. Keep going - I'm here for you."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] John said: "Thanks a lot, Maria. Your help is really motivating and makes me more determined. Here's a pic of my family - they're the reason why I never give up. Their love gives me strength."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] Maria said: "Wow, John, that's a great pic! Your family looks so cheerful and loving. It's wonderful to have such a supportive and loving family."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] John said: "Thanks, Maria. They really help me stay centered. They remind me why I'm so passionate about making a positive impact."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] Maria said: "Family's love really grounds us and gives us strength. Their support certainly boosts your motivation."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] John said: "Yeah, they are my rock in tough times and always cheer me on. I'm really thankful for their love. Family time means a lot to me."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] Maria said: "Wow, John, that playground looks cool! What kind of stuff do you and your family do there?"
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] John said: "Thanks, Maria! We love climbing, sliding, and playing games. It's an awesome way to connect and have a blast. What do you enjoy doing with your family?"
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] Maria said: "My fam's small, but I love spending time with the friends I have. We usually watch movies, hike, and have game nights at my place. Quality connections matter most to me."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] John said: "Sounds nice, Maria! Spending time with loved ones is important."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] Maria said: "Definitely, John. They bring us joy, support, and a feeling of being part of something special. We should cherish every moment with them."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] John said: "Yeah Maria, making memories with family is priceless! Life is so much more meaningful when we spend time together. Here's a pic of us at dinner."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] Maria said: "Woah, that's a nice pic, John! You all obviously had a blast at dinner. Nothing beats getting together with loved ones for a good meal - it makes some awesome memories!"
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] John said: "Thanks, Maria! Meal times are always fun. Good food, laughs, and chats help us stay close."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] Maria said: "Yeah, John! It definitely builds a strong bond. Those shared meals really make life enjoyable and meaningful. What did you make?"
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] John said: "We made pizza! We had so much fun making them together. It was great picking out toppings and sharing a tasty meal with family. Have you made anything lately?"
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] Maria said: "I can picture you all laughing and having a blast making your own pizzas - a great way to bond! I made some peach cobbler recently, it was great."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] John said: "Yeah Maria, it's awesome! We get our creative on and have a blast together."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] Maria said: "Sure, John! It's those moments of creativity and laughter that bring us closer. Let's make happy memories with our family and keep them close."
[6:10 pm on 22 December, 2022] John said: " Yep, let's keep making great memories with our loved ones and cherishing the time we have. I'm off to do some taekwondo!""""

Return JSON:
```json
{{
    "dates": [
        {{
            "date_str": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "timestamp": <unix timestamp as float or null>,
            "context": "brief description of what this date refers to"
        }}
    ],
    "intervals": [
        {{
            "start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "start_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "end_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "context": "brief description"
        }}
    ],
    "start_ts": <earliest unix timestamp or null>,
    "end_ts": <latest unix timestamp or null>
}}
```

If no temporal information is found, return empty lists and null timestamps.

JSON Output: /no_think
